name: Click in Place 6.7qt Shallow Plastic Storage Bin for Home and Office Organization Green Tint - Brightroom™
description:
Whether organizing your home or office, this Shallow Bin from Brightroom™ is the tool you need for efficient storage. Featuring a stackable design for compact spaces, this transparent shallow bin lets you easily see what you've stored inside. Designed in a sleek shape, this storage box comes with two side integrated handles for easy carrying, and it has a capacity of 7.2 quarts, offering ample space for storing a range of items.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
